name: VIDT
changelog: 🎨 NEW: Independent text watermark and logo - use both simultaneously
📁 NEW: Create timestamped subfolder option for organized video editing
📂 NEW: 'Go' button to quickly open save location folder
💾 NEW: Export all downloaded URLs feature with auto-save option
✅ IMPROVED: Text and logo now have separate position controls
✅ IMPROVED: Settings dialog size increased for better usability
✅ FIXED: Text watermark and logo conflict resolved
✅ FIXED: Subfolder creation now works correctly for batch editing
PREVIOUS: Profile extraction limits increased to 2000+ videos
PREVIOUS: Enhanced TikTok page extraction and performance
